column1: # Tangram jgmenu. Commands intentionally avoid BunsenLabs helper scripts so
# the menu works on a clean Raspberry Pi OS Lite install.

column2: xterm -T "Network Info" -e sh -c "ip -br addr; printf '\\nPress Enter to close '; read"
xterm -T "Disk Usage" -e sh -c "df -h; printf '\\nPress Enter to close '; read"
xterm -T "System Info" -e sh -c "hostnamectl; printf '\\n'; free -h; printf '\\n'; df -h /; printf '\\nPress Enter to close '; read"
xterm -T "APT Update" -e sh -c "sudo apt update; printf '\\nPress Enter to close '; read"
xterm -T "APT Upgrade" -e sh -c "sudo apt full-upgrade; printf '\\nPress Enter to close '; read"
xterm -T "Running Services" -e sh -c "systemctl --type=service --state=running --no-pager; printf '\\nPress Enter to close '; read"
xterm -T "Journal Errors" -e sh -c "journalctl -p 3 -xb --no-pager; printf '\\nPress Enter to close '; read"
sh -c 'command -v slock >/dev/null && slock || command -v xlock >/dev/null && xlock || true'
